notes: Confirmed on davinespro.com US line page: 'ammonia-formulated, permanent colour' with Vibrachrom technology, 100% white coverage, Extralift series up to 5 levels.
Confirmed on davinespro.com US line page: 'ammonia free permanent colouring system', full white coverage, lifts up to 3 levels (4.5 with 000 Booster).
Confirmed on davinespro.com US line page: acidic pH, ammonia-free demi-permanent system for toning/refreshing, blends up to 50% white hair.
Confirmed on davinespro.com US line page and official Davines blog: ammonia-free demi-permanent alkaline colour, 60 nuances, up to 1 level of lift, up to 70% white coverage.
Confirmed on davinespro.com US line page: premium bleaching system of three products - Progress (multi-purpose powder), Liberty (free-hand powder), Tolerance (ammonia-free lightening oil).
Confirmed on davinespro.com US line page and us.davines.com collection (15 products in stock): ammonia-free direct colouring system in gel, 14 nuances plus Finest Gloss, no activator required.
Confirmed on framesiprofessional.com (US) line page: permanent color, 103 shades, 22 series, 100% gray coverage, up to 5 levels of lift, 1:2 mix ratio. Also listed on framesi.it/en global site.

Listed in framesi.it/en main navigation as 'FRAMCOLOR 2001 INTENSE PERMANENT COLOR - COMFORT FORMULA' and shown as a permanent line in the framesiprofessional.com Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF; dedicated line page URL not captured.

Confirmed on framesiprofessional.com (US) line page: pre-mixed permanent color, 60+ shades, 100% gray coverage, 1:1 mix ratio, up to 5 levels of lift. Also on framesi.it/en (product-framcolor-glamour).

Confirmed via framesi.it/en navigation ('FRAMCOLOR ECLECTIC DEMI-PERMANENT AMMONIA FREE COLOR') and framesiprofessional.com Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF: ammonia-free, PPD-free demi-permanent, 1:2 mix ratio, up to 100% gray coverage.

Confirmed via framesi.it/en navigation ('FRAMCOLOR ECLECTIC CARE PERMANENT AMMONIA-FREE COLOR') and framesiprofessional.com Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF: ammonia-free permanent, 100% gray coverage, up to 3 levels of lift, intermixable with Framcolor Eclectic.
Listed in framesi.it/en main navigation as 'FRAMCOLOR ECLECTIC 5D COLOR GLOSS DEMI-PERMANENT LIQUID COLOR'; not verified on the US site, so marked global.
Listed in framesi.it/en main navigation as 'FRAMCOLOR PURE PIGMENT PLUS DIRECT PIGMENTS COLOR&CARE'; categorized as direct pigments by the official site.

Confirmed on framesiprofessional.com (US) line page: lightener family including Infinity+ (10+ levels), Diamond, No Dust, Cream Plus; Clay Lightener also listed in the 2022 product guide. Also on framesi.it/en as 'DECOLOR B SYSTEM'.

Appears as a permanent haircolor line in the framesiprofessional.com Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF, but is not listed in the current framesi.it/en navigation or among current US line pages found; current status unverified.
Confirmed on keune.com (including the North America /na/ page): 'our permanent color range', Tinta Color 2023 relaunch, Shade Shifters enable up to 650 custom shades.
Confirmed on keune.com: ammonia-free demi-permanent range, up to 24 washes, up to 70% grey blending, vegan formula. Despite the 'Semi' name, the official page describes it as demi-permanent.
Confirmed on keune.com (global and /na/ pages): ammonia-free color range with up to 100% grey coverage; described as a permanent coloring treatment (pigments penetrate the cortex).
Confirmed on keune.com: range of nine intense direct dyes plus two shade shifters (Clear and Dark); ammonia-free, no developer, fully removable; launched March 2020 per distributor blog.

Confirmed on the keune.com Keune Color overview page: 'a range of professional lightening powders... and a collection of toners'; categorized as mixed_system because it spans lighteners and toners. Dedicated line page URL not captured.

brand_line_inventory.canonical_key: Alfaparf Milano Professional::Evolution of the Color::US
notes: Confirmed on alfaparfmilanopro.com (listed on us-en homepage; full line page verified on ie-en): 'long-lasting permanent cosmetic color' with patented Color Guard technology; official PDF shows 123 shades.

brand_line_inventory.canonical_key: Alfaparf Milano Professional::Evolution of the Color Shine Effect::global
brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Evolution of the Color Shine Effect
notes: Confirmed via official 2025 technical PDF on alfaparfmilanopro.com and listing on the int-en products page: ammonia- and MEA-free permanent color, 55 shades, emollient-oil alkalizing system.
Confirmed on alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage ('The natural evolution of tone-on-tone color') and int-en products page; tone-on-tone (demi) coloring with natural-origin alkalizing agent.

brand_line_inventory.canonical_key: Alfaparf Milano Professional::Color Wear Gloss Toner::US
notes: Confirmed as a distinct listing on the alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage color range; toner for post-bleaching/gloss services within the Color Wear family.

Confirmed on alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage ('Pure, ultra-concentrated pigments') and int-en products page with named shades (Ash .1, Gold .3, Copper .4, Red .6, etc.); pure pigment additives mixed into color or care services, hence mixed_system.
Confirmed on alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage ('rEvolution - Direct cream color') and int-en products page which lists rEvolution JC shades (e.g., Magenta).

Confirmed as a listing in the color range on the official alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage; described in search results as the professional lightening line with multiple powders and Bond System technology. Dedicated line page not fetched.

Confirmed in Aveda's official professional hair color brochure (joinaveda.com, 2023/2024): 'full spectrum permanent vegan treatment hair color' with patented technology, 100% grey coverage; salon-exclusive per aveda.com/hair-color.
Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure: 'extra lift & deposit creme color for dark hair', up to 6 levels of lift in 30 minutes; launched 2004 per avedameansbusiness.com history article.

Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure: 'custom-deposit treatment hair color', ammonia-free demi-permanent results, up to 24 washes, blends up to 75% grey; debuted 2018 per avedameansbusiness.com.

Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure and on aveda.com/vibrant-hair-color: 'semi-permanent treatment hair color', nine shades plus Clear/Charcoal mixers, lasts up to 15 washes, 95% naturally derived.

Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure: components are Enlightener powder lightener, Enlightener creme booster, and 3 Enlightener blonde finish protective toners; Enlightener also referenced in stylist formulas on aveda.com/hair-color. Mixed_system because it spans lighteners and toners.

issue_log.details: Listed in the prompt as a possible color line, but official sources (davinespro.com UK Mask page and an Allure article) describe Heart of Glass as a blonde care/maintenance and bonding-treatment family, not a hair color line. Excluded from the inventory.

Listed in the prompt as a possible color line, but Keune BLEND is a hair styling product line (gel, glue, de-frizz) launched in 2017, per retailer pages and a launch press article. No evidence of a Keune color line named Blend on keune.com. Excluded from the inventory.
No Aveda line named 'Vivids' or 'AVC' was found on official sources. Aveda's vivid/fashion-shade line is officially named Full Spectrum Vibrants (semi-permanent), which is included instead.
Direct fetch returned a Chromium error/JS shell rather than readable content. Individual line pages were instead verified via search-indexed content from davinespro.com line URLs.

Fetch returned only navigation and a sign-in form; line details were verified via individual line pages (Framcolor 2001, Framcolor Glamour, Decolor B) and the official Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF.

Appears as a permanent color line in the official framesiprofessional.com Ultimate Product Guide 2022 PDF but is absent from current framesi.it/en navigation and current US line pages found; marked apparent_status=unclear.

issue_log.item: Framesi Framcolor 2001 Intense / Eclectic 5D Color Gloss / Pure Pigment Plus
issue_log.details: Verified only via the framesi.it/en site navigation text (and, for 2001 Intense, the US product guide PDF); dedicated line page URLs were not captured, so official_line_url is null.

issue_log.item: Alfaparf BB Bleach and Color Wear / Color Wear Gloss Toner
issue_log.details: Verified via listings on the official alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage and int-en products page rather than dedicated line pages; official_line_url left null where no line-specific URL was confirmed.

Aveda's consumer site (aveda.com) describes color only as salon services; detailed line-level facts come from the official salon-facing brochure hosted on joinaveda.com (Aveda's professional recruitment/education site). Brochure data verified is dated 2023, fetched June 2026.
Verified via the official keune.com/keune-color overview page describing it as lightening powders plus toners; a dedicated Ultimate Blonde line page URL was not captured.
